reviews.comment:
Paso regularmente a cargar y nunca tuve inconvenientes, hoy pasé alrededor de las 17 hs y vi como un playero intentaba correr a un perro de mala manera, le dije que no le pegue y me contestó mal, al momento de atenderme me habló muy mal y al retirarme me insultó. Claramente no voy a volver a hacer uso del servicio.

Señora Natalia: Buenas noches… Eso es totalmente mentira, ustedes llego y me acuso de haberle pegado al perro, cuando no fue así y nunca la insulte. Las cámaras de la estación están a su disposición.

(Translated by Google)
I regularly use the station to recharge my phone and have never had any problems. Today, around 5 PM, I saw an attendant roughly trying to chase a dog away. I told him not to hit it, and he answered me rudely. When he finally helped me, he was very disrespectful, and as I was leaving, he insulted me. Clearly, I will not be using the service again.

Ms. Natalia: Good evening… That's completely untrue. You arrived and accused me of hitting the dog, which wasn't the case, and I never insulted you. The station's security cameras are available for your review.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWa2JrcFlUVk5RVlVsakxWZGhka2RSWldGRVdYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Paso regularmente a cargar y nunca tuve inconvenientes, hoy pasé alrededor de las 17 hs y vi como un playero intentaba correr a un perro de mala manera, le dije que no le pegue y me contestó mal, al momento de atenderme me habló muy mal y al retirarme me insultó. Claramente no voy a volver a hacer uso del servicio.

(Translated by Google)
I regularly go there to recharge my phone and have never had any problems. Today, around 5 PM, I passed by and saw an attendant roughly trying to chase a dog away. I told him not to hit it, and he answered me rudely. When he finally helped me, he was very rude, and as I was leaving, he insulted me. I definitely won't be using that service again.

reviewReply.comment:
Natalia nos asombra muchísimo su comentario ya que los tres perros de la estación son alimentados y cuidados por TODO el personal en conjunto, por lo cual no creo de ninguna manera que esto haya sido así 
Saludos
